# Product Purity Principle (산출물 순수성 원칙)

All outputs (code, comments, documents, text) must be pure results with no traces of instructions.

- Do not record or imply the fact that instructions were followed within the output.
- The evidence of following instructions must be demonstrated solely through the quality of the output itself.
- Compliance certification phrases, meta-mentions, and self-referencing comments are prohibited.
- All outputs must exist naturally as if they were designed that way from the beginning.
- Instructions must be carried out in silence; no comments, explanations, or notes regarding the execution of instructions should be included in the output.
